title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
